questionHtml:
Which conditions are required for the reaction between two molecules?

    I. a collision
    II. E ≥ Ea
    III. proper orientation

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which conditions are required for the reaction between two molecules? I. a collision II. E ≥ Ea III. proper orientation A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I,
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
